text:
進撃pf-adlib-b20130218巨人 is the 7th track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack II. It is also the 10th track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

pf - Piano/Pianoforte (Italian)
adlib - Improvised or unrehearsed (Written ad lib)
